intro: Five dairy-free, egg-free weeknight dinners built from this week's Publix BOGOs and Kroger deals. Proteins are running especially cheap — chicken thighs, salmon, pork chops, shrimp, and ground chicken are all on sale.

recipes.title: Chimichurri Chicken Thighs with Jasmine Rice & Blistered Mushrooms
recipes.blurb: Pre-marinated chimichurri thighs seared until crisp, served over fluffy jasmine rice with garlicky pan-blistered baby bellas.

saleIngredients.item: Publix Marinated Boneless Skinless Chicken Thighs (Chimichurri)

steps: Start the jasmine rice: rinse 1.5 cups, simmer with 2.25 cups water and a pinch of salt, covered, ~15 min; rest off heat.
Pat the chicken thighs dry and sear in a hot skillet with a little olive oil, 5–6 min per side until 165°F and caramelized. Rest on a plate.
In the same pan, add a splash more oil and the mushrooms. Cook undisturbed 3–4 min to blister, then toss with a little garlic and salt for another 2 min.
Fluff the rice, slice the chicken, and serve with mushrooms and sliced avocado on top.
recipes.note: The chimichurri marinade is oil-and-herb based — dairy/egg-free. No cheese or crema needed.

recipes.title: Sheet-Pan Salmon with Crispy Smashed Potatoes
recipes.blurb: Roasted salmon fillets with olive-oil smashed russets — one sheet pan, no dairy, big crispy edges.
steps: Boil small whole potatoes until fork-tender, ~15 min. Drain and let steam-dry a few minutes.
Smash each potato flat on an oiled sheet pan, brush with olive oil, season, and roast at 450°F for 20 min until crisp.
Push potatoes aside, add the salmon fillets, brush with oil and Grill Mates, and roast 10–12 min more until the fish flakes.
Finish with a squeeze of lemon and serve.
recipes.note: Grill Mates blends are dairy/egg-free, but glance at the label if you swap to a Bacon or creamy variety.

recipes.title: Salsa-Smothered Pork Chops with Rice & Avocado
recipes.blurb: Quick-seared lean pork chops finished in chunky salsa, piled over microwave-fast rice with cool avocado.

saleIngredients.item: Publix Lean Boneless Pork Loin Chops

steps: Season pork chops with salt, pepper, and a little cumin. Sear in a hot oiled skillet 3–4 min per side.
Pour in the salsa, cover, and simmer 5–6 min until the chops reach 145°F and the sauce thickens.
Heat the Ready Rice per package. Serve chops and salsa over rice with sliced avocado.
Spoon extra pan salsa over the top.
recipes.note: Plain Pace salsa is dairy/egg-free — skip the queso-style dips on sale this week, which contain dairy.

recipes.title: Ground Chicken Tacos with Avocado & Salsa
recipes.blurb: Fast skillet-seasoned ground chicken in warm flour tortillas, loaded with avocado and chunky salsa — no cheese needed.
steps: Brown the ground chicken in a skillet, breaking it up, ~6–8 min.
Stir in chili powder, cumin, garlic powder, salt, and a splash of water; simmer 2–3 min until saucy.
Warm the tortillas in a dry pan or microwave.
Fill tortillas with chicken, sliced avocado, and a spoonful of salsa.
recipes.note: Check the tortilla label — most Mission flour tortillas are dairy/egg-free, but a few varieties add milk. Skip the sour cream and queso on sale this week.

recipes.title: Garlic Shrimp & Mushroom Spaghetti
recipes.blurb: Olive-oil garlic shrimp tossed with blistered mushrooms and spaghetti — a bright, brothy, no-cream pasta.
steps: Boil spaghetti in salted water until al dente; reserve a cup of pasta water before draining.
Thaw and pat shrimp dry. In a wide pan, cook mushrooms in olive oil until browned, then push aside.
Add more oil, sliced garlic, and red pepper flakes; add shrimp and cook 2–3 min until just pink.
Toss in the pasta with a splash of pasta water and a squeeze of lemon; loosen to a light sauce and finish with parsley.
recipes.note: Standard dry spaghetti is dairy/egg-free; avoid fresh or 'egg' pasta. This sauce is olive-oil based — no butter or cheese.
